custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged passages are from the author’s prose; no quoted or clearly attributed source text was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagged items are mostly defensible as bias in author prose, though two rely on structural claims (slant) that are debatable rather than clear cut.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple clear author-level biases: 'chaotic week' (subjective adjective), 'turned to ash' (loaded metaphor), 'That threat is real' (opinion-as-fact), and lack of attribution for casualty/arrest figures.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are often off: 'bloody crackdown' fits Subjective Qualifying Adjectives/Omission of Source Attribution more than Negativity Bias; 'decimated' is Word Choice more than Sensationalism; two 'Slant' items better fit Bias by Omission or Opinion Statements Presented as Fact.
